posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Blocked from using automations with your mirror columns and connect boards? Struggling to use board filters with mirrored columns? Smart Mirror Column apps is the right solution for you.

Easily sync data between your boards Mirror columns and standard columns to achieve the ultimate automation and filtering flexibility. Set up in minutes a solution that will let you cast data between your monday.com boards columns and Mirror columns.

See the demo below. Learn more here
